description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:19.03.2 Docker image with the docker:19.03.2-dind service and a global before_script that logs in to $CI_REGISTRY with $CI_REGISTRY_USER and $CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD. Define three stages (prepare, test, build) and set global variables DOCKER_DRIVER=overlay2 and DOCKER_TLS_CERTDIR=/certs. In the prepare stage add a prepare_2019_1_3f1 job that retries twice, runs ci/prepare.sh, sets variables BUILD=f1, DOWNLOAD_URL=https://beta.unity3d.com/download/dc414eb9ed43/UnitySetup-2019.1.3f1, SHA1=ea97ef4c42180bd833e5b31b56f083b727a99cc8, TAG=2019.1.3f1, VERSION=2019.1.3, and stores licence_request.alf as an artifact. In the test stage add a test-ci-generator job that uses the python:3.7-alpine image, runs a before_script to cd ci-generator, check python version, install virtualenv, create and activate a venv, install requirements, caches .cache/pip and ci-generator/venv/, then executes coverage run -m unittest tests/test*.py, coverage report, coverage html, and publishes ci-generator/htmlcov as an artifact. In the build stage add six unity_2019_1_3f1-* jobs (android, ios, linux-il2cpp, mac, webgl, windows) that each retry twice, run the shared script ci/build.sh, and define component‑specific variables such as COMPONENTS, DOCKERFILE_NAME, DOWNLOAD_URL, SHA1, TAG, VERSION, RELEASE_URL and RELEASE_NOTES.
